lead_state._metric_fields_unavailable: gap_m / closing_speed_ms / ttc_s are metric quantities a forward camera VLM cannot measure; the 48-clip pilot measured this model fabricating band edges on 48 % of clips. The coarse categorical state is sufficient to STRATIFY a metric and insufficient to compute headway or TTC.

language.caption: Ego vehicle turns right on a rural road at night, accelerating while steering through a curve with no other vehicles or obstacles present.

coc_trace.observation: Ego vehicle turns right on a rural road at night, accelerating while steering through a curve with no other vehicles or obstacles present.
coc_trace.justification: The turn is executed smoothly, with no need to adjust speed or direction due to external factors, indicating a straightforward driving maneuver in an empty environment.
coc_trace.decision: Continue turning right while maintaining speed and lane position, as the road is clear and no adjustments are necessary.
